UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Information about the user and their assigned role.

Sale.title: Sale Record
Sale.description: A record of a transaction made by a seller.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user roles and profile details. Users are allowed to read and write their own profile document where {userId} matches their authentication UID.

/sales/{saleId}.description: Global collection of sales transactions. Accessible by sellers for creation and owners for analysis. Sellers can create sales, owners can read all sales.

/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Global collection of business expenses. Accessible by sellers for recording and owners for review. Sellers can create expenses, owners can read all expenses.
